# Brief — beauty / awwwards-probe-2026-05-10-v5

## Aesthetic
Awwwards-tier probe V5. The OVERRIDE block at the top of the
kit_generation prompt is authoritative for type scale, typeface,
palette, page anatomy, CTA discipline, motion, photography,
buyer-replace tokens, services type-stack, footer structure,
hero-h1 markup discipline, contacts copy discipline, stylesheet
load policy, hero headline overflow discipline, BG × photo luminance
differential, and banned patterns.

The reference set for V5 is the FULL 5-SOTD batch from 2026-05-08
(NOT Studio Namma alone). Studio Namma is the quality bar to MATCH,
not the structural template to replicate. Per the REFERENCE PALETTE
section of OVERRIDE, the kit must apply at least 3 distinct moves
distilled from non-Namma references (Marvell, T11, Astrodither, Obys).

## Conversion structure
Per OVERRIDE: ONE primary CTA, small-caps label, reused. NO header
click-to-call. NO trust-badge row.

## Palette
Per OVERRIDE PALETTE — COLOR-LED, MULTI-TONAL section. Minimum 4
colors. Pick ONE family from the V5 enumeration (warm-earth /
cool-jewel / sun-baked / acid-tech / editorial-mid-century) OR
propose your own consistent palette. Annotate which family.

## Typography
Per OVERRIDE TYPEFACE section. ONE family.

## Layout patterns
Per OVERRIDE PAGE ANATOMY + REFERENCE PALETTE distilled moves.

## Hero copy seed
Per HERO HEADLINE OVERFLOW DISCIPLINE: every word ≤ 10 chars.
Headline: "Skin, kept." or similar short-word headline at your
discretion.

## Five reference notes
All 5 SOTD vault entries are referenced. Studio Namma's screenshot
is also passed as REF_IMAGE_1; remaining slots are populated by
Marvell and Astrodither screenshots.
